name: Croquete De Carne ( Beef Croquette)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups ground roast beef or roast beef
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together 2 eggs.
2. Mix in 1/2 cup flour, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Stir in 1 tablespoon chopped parsley.
4. Add the yolk separately and mix well with the other ingredients.
5. Heat about 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Cook onion and garlic in hot oil until onion starts changing color.
7. Add tomatoes and cook to a paste (simmer).
8. Add ground meat, gravy, and stir for 5 minutes.
9. Mix milk and flour together and add to the saucepan, stirring until thick.
10. Stir in yolk and parsley off the heat. Let cool.
11. Form small balls, about the size of walnuts.
12. Dip each ball in beaten eggs.
13. Roll in flour.
14. Dip again in eggs.
15. Coat with breadcrumbs. This can be frozen at this point.
16. Heat plenty of oil in a deep fryer or heavy skillet to 350°F (175°C).
17. Deep fry the croquettes until golden brown, turning occasionally for even cooking.
18. Remove with a slotted spoon onto paper towels to drain excess oil.
19. Serve as an appetizer or with a salad.
Note: Adjust the amount of flour used to achieve the desired consistency, which should be that of a thick paste.
